# nightshift-ai

## How-to guides

Jira and GitHub setup for sdlc — Wire a repo's sdlc plugin to Jira Cloud and GitHub so the pipeline can read stories and open PRs — docs/integrations/jira-and-github.md

## Reference

Changelog — Release notes are generated from commit messages by nx release; this page points to the canonical GitHub Releases and plugin changelogs. — docs/changelog/index.md
